characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. Smooth white synthetic face with grey eyes. Metallic body with exposed joints and wiring at the neck and shoulders.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing, exposed white and metallic robotic exterior.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. Short dark hair and a light beard/mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue t-shirt with thin white horizontal stripes.
characters.demeanor: Curious, slightly hesitant, and eager to learn.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?]

Character B says: I went to माल yesterday. [I went to maal yesterday.]

Character A says: माल? Pronunciation थोड़ा गलत है। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. [Maal? The pronunciation is a bit wrong. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday.]

Character A says: कल क्या खाया? [What did you eat yesterday?]

Character B says: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat peeja ate.]

Character A says: पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है, इसलिए Eat नहीं, Ate. I ate pizza. [Peeja? No, Pizza. And the event is from yesterday, so not Eat, but Ate. I ate pizza.]

Character A says: ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Where do you catch the train from?]

Character B says: I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन. [I pick train from railway e-station.]

Character A says: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। ट्रेन उठाओगे क्या? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और ईस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Are you going to lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not e-station, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.]

Character B says: Ohhh मेरा pronunciation बहुत weak है। [Ohhh my pronunciation is very weak.]

Character A says: कोई बात नहीं! Supernova का AI tutor try किया? [No problem! Have you tried Supernova's AI tutor?]

Character B says: वो महँगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं, बहुत affordable है। Supernova पर आप बिना किसी झिझक के practice कर सकते हो। [Not at all, it's very affordable. On Supernova, you can practice without any hesitation.]

Character B says: पर रोज़ time नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time every day.]

Character A says: दिन के बस 15-20 मिनट काफी हैं। धीरे-धीरे confidence आ जाएगा। [Just 15-20 minutes a day is enough. Slowly you will gain confidence.]

Character B says: Wow, कैसे join करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: नीचे install button पर click करो। Supernova app download करो और आज ही बोलना शुरू करो! [Click on the install button below. Download the Supernova app and start speaking today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with relatable, everyday English mistakes and gentle corrections.
- Establishes the learner's pain point (weak pronunciation, lack of time/money) and introduces Supernova as the practical, affordable solution.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call to action to start practicing.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही अपना trial शुरू करो और English बोलने की practice करो। [Start your trial today and practice speaking English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the educational hook to the product offering.
- Highlights the core value propositions (24/7 AI tutor, instant feedback) without relying on aggressive pricing gimmicks.
- Maintains the warm, encouraging tone while driving conversion.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
सब कुछ UNLOCK करो (Unlock everything)
Affordable Plans
Supernova Pro के फायदे (Supernova Pro benefits)
24/7 आपका Personal AI English Teacher (24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher)
Instant feedback के साथ grammar सही करो (Correct grammar with instant feedback)
Start Trial
Safe Payments. कभी भी Cancel करें। (Safe Payments. Cancel anytime.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Install now पर click करो और Supernova app download करो। [Click on Install now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final, direct call to action.
- Visually reinforces the app name and its primary function (Spoken English App).
- Provides a clear next step for the user.
